text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash wants to go shopping, so we stop by
the shopping mall on our way home.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Thank you for accompanying me.
choice_data_list: Of course. So what do you need to buy?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I wish to purchase thank-you gifts for people who
have helped me during my time in Japan. I have
been saving up for this occasion.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I have a list of what I'd like to get, so this should
not take long. Let's be on our way.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
A comfortable pillow for Falcon, a clutch purse
for Jordan...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
A Moai statue for Golshi... A tumbler for
Nakayama...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Now, only one gift remains. I'm surprised I'm still
under budget.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: You, of course.
choice_data_list: You don't have to get me anything!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Of course I do. You have helped me more than
anyone.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Is there anything in particular you would like? My
budget is now higher than anticipated, so I'm
open to requests.
choice_data_list: I'd like to look around first.
I'm fine with anything you pick!
I'm fine with anything you pick!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Is there anything in particular you would like? My
budget is now higher than anticipated, so I'm
open to requests.
choice_data_list: I'd like to look around first.
I'm fine with anything you pick!
I'm fine with anything you pick!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Very well. Let's find something together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We browse for a while until suddenly, I notice
Eishin Flash staring intently at one particular
item.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a stopwatch decorated with ladybugs. Now
that I think about it, Eishin Flash does love
ladybugs...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Oh. Excuse me. I didn't mean to get distracted...
choice_data_list: I think I'd like that stopwatch.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Huh? You've taken a liking to it as well?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Wait... Can it be you are planning to regift it to
me?
choice_data_list: Oops. You saw right through my plan.
Oops. You saw right through my plan.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Of course I did. You are kind as always.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: However, this is supposed to be a gift of gratitude for you.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: So as happy as I am for your thoughtfulness—
choice_data_list: Your happiness is the best gift I could ask for.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
...Very well. Then I shall graciously accept your
kindness...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I shall treasure it with my whole heart.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash carries the stopwatch to the register
with a truly priceless smile.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Here you go...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She hands me the stopwatch, and then I present it
back to her.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: ...Thank you very much, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Wait a moment. Before we do—

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Please accept this.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Open it. You'll see.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I do as she says and discover a picture frame
inside.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't ignore my desire to gift you something,
you see...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
There is a particular picture I wish for you to put
in that frame.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
The picture we'll take together to commemorate
my victory at a race.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I believe that would be the best proof that I have
achieved what I must—and the gift that would
bring you the most joy.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Please look forward to that day.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After receiving such a wonderful present from
Eishin Flash, I feel even more determined to work
hard together with her.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Anything, you say? But I want to choose
something that I know you will like...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Hmm. What a predicament.
choice_data_list: You don't need to put so much thought into it.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Please be patient. I shall find the perfect gift for
you within the next twelve minutes, thirty
seconds.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Eishin Flash takes off before I can try to stop her.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Seven minutes, eighteen seconds remain. Hmm...
I'm struggling to find the right gift...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
No, I mustn't fret. Toi, toi, toi... I should return to
the floor map and think it over...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hi! I thought that was you, Flash! ♪ Never
thought I'd bump into you here!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Huh? You're by yourself? But this morning you
told me you were going to be hanging out with
your trainer...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Hello, Falcon. That is true, but I am currently—

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, okay! So you're looking for something to
get your trainer, huh?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Not too long ago, we were watching TV when the
trainer took a liking to the Arita ware teacups
they were showcasing...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
But then again, there was the fancy table lamp
they introduced in the Scandinavian-themed
program too...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Taking such remarks into consideration, the
perfect gift must be... No, there must be
something else... Hm...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Umm... Aren't you overthinking this?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Indeed, my thoughts are in gridlock. Only five
minutes, twenty-eight seconds remain... Will I be
able to find a suitable gift in time?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hmm... Well, at times like this, you should...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Thank you for your patience, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Here... Please accept this gift.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It's a cake. As the daughter of pastry chefs, I can
attest to the quality of the patisserie where I
purchased this.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I'm sure, well... I think you will like how it tastes.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I can only hope this is a satisfactory gift...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Oh! What a relief...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Yay! I'm so glad it worked out! Good for you!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Thank you. Your advice was most helpful, Falcon.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! Aren't I just the best? When it comes to
stuff like this, you don't have go for a perfect
score or anything.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It was just like you said—it's the thought that
counts. Clearly conveying my sincerity was all I
needed to do.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I hope Trainer is enjoying the cake right now.
